name: Moyasar
description: Moyasar — Saudi Arabia payment gateway supporting mada, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and stcpay for online and in-app merchants.

seo.title: Moyasar — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Moyasar: Moyasar — Saudi Arabia payment gateway supporting mada, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and stcpay for online and in-app merchants.

when_to_use: Accepting mada + Apple Pay for Saudi e-commerce checkout
Integrating stcpay wallet for KSA mobile apps
Recurring billing for Saudi subscription merchants
Embedding hosted payment page for marketplace sellers

pros: Solid mada and stcpay support in Saudi Arabia
Apple Pay integration ready out of the box
Modern API docs in English and Arabic
Good fit for Saudi SMBs and startups
cons: Smaller scale than HyperPay for enterprise
review.verdict: Developer-friendly Saudi gateway — first choice for KSA startups and SMBs wanting mada and stcpay.
review.best_for: Saudi Arabian SMBs and startups integrating local payment methods
review.not_for: Enterprises needing broader MENA coverage or global gateway
